name: AWS CloudTrail
description: This app integrates with AWS CloudTrail to perform various investigative actions

actions.name: Describe Trails
actions.description: Retrieve settings for trails associated with the current region and the multi-region trails

parameters.name: include_shadow_trails
parameters.description: Inform command to include shadow trails

actions.name: Run Query
actions.description: Lookup the management events captured by CloudTrail

parameters.name: attribute_key
parameters.description: Select an Attribute to query by (or leave blank to retrieve all records)

parameters.name: attribute_value
parameters.description: Specify the Value by which to search. Note that true/false values must be lower-case

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date in the format of yyyy-mm-dd (e.g. 2019-12-25)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date in the format of yyyy-mm-dd (e.g. 2019-12-25)
